title: Going pink for boobs at Herold's Bay
description: GEORGE NEWS AND VIDEO - A flock of very...
bodyText:
Update
                            Video

GEORGE NEWS AND VIDEO - A flock of very excited women, clad in bright pink, tested the waters in Herold's Bay around 08:00 this morning, Saturday 11 October.


> This early morning dip was all for a good cause, raising funds for early breast cancer detection for those who are unable to pay for screening tests.


This initiative, "I love Boobies", has been around for a while, but it's the first time that it has been held in George.

Pink cupcakes awaited the brave swimmers after their fun experience.

VIDEO: Michelle Pienaar

Waiting to take to the water.

Yozelde du Plessis, Karin Hewitt, Vanessa Liebenberg (all the way from Preroria) and Zinré Pretorius.

Previous article: Dip, swim or float for a cause

‘We bring you the latest Garden Route, Hessequa, Karoo news’
